title: Suwimut 4 Pack Acrylic Square Vase, 12.5x23cm/5x9 Inch Tall, Clear, Unbreakable, Minimalist, Perfect for Home, Office, Wedding Decorations
features: High Quality: Vases for flowers are crafted of premium quality crystal clear acrylic to maximize content visibility. Lightweight, shatter-proof, long lasting and easy to take care of. Ideal for your use everyday and everywhere.

Decorative and Functional: Fill with a fresh bouquet of real or artificial flowers when used as a centerpiece. Place in the center of a table, in the corner of your desk, on your bathroom vanity, in any displayed space to give the room a nice touch.

Widely Use: Clear flower vase is suitable for living room, bedroom, dining room table, conference room, wedding scene. Perfect fit for office or home decor. A must-have item for both fresh flower arrangements and dried floral designs.

Great Gift: The flower plastic vase can be a great gift for Christmas, Birthday, Thanksgiving, house warming, wedding, anniversary and any other special occasions. A great present to your family, friends or lovers who likes to decor accents around the house.

Ideal Size: This plastic square vase measures 23cm/9 inches height by 12.5cm/5 inches wide opening. A simple design with ample capacity. Ideal for small to medium bouquets of flowers and other decorative arrangements. An elegant object for any place at home.
description: Product Description Suwimut 4 Pack Acrylic Flower Vase, Unbreakable Clear Square Tapered Table Flowers Vase Decorative Centerpiece for Home Kitchen Wedding Decorations Decorate your home, office or special event with this attractive hard plastic vase. Fill with artificial flowers, floral or greenery additions for a stunning display that instantly brightens up bedroom, lounge and office. It is also an ideal gift for family, lovers and friends on Christmas, Thanksgiving, house warming, wedding, and anniversary. This plastic square vase measures 9 inches height by 5 inches wide opening. A simple design with ample capacity. Ideal for small to medium bouquets of flowers and other decorative arrangements. An elegant object for any place at home. Vases for flowers are crafted of premium quality crystal clear acrylic to maximize content visibility. Lightweight, shatter-proof, long lasting and easy to take care of. Ideal for your use everyday and everywhere. Clear flower vase is suitable for living room, bedroom, dining room table, conference room, wedding scene. Perfect fit for office or home decor. A must-have item for both fresh flower arrangements and dried floral designs.
